eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Swift, MN; at 1:32 PM on JUN 13, 2026 Effective until 2:32 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The City of Benson is excited to announce that the Water Boil Advisory that was in effect is now lifted! It is recommended that residents run their faucets for 2 minutes to flush any old water out of their pipes. Thank you for your cooperation, patience, and understanding during this event.
